title: Artyfact Announcements
text:
📹 ArtyPoints System Explained! ⚡️

🎮 How ArtyPoints (AP) are earned in matches:
🎯 1 AP – is awarded for each kill
🏆 25 AP – for a team victory
📈 1 AP – for every 1000 Score Points (SP)

🔍 SP are given for:
🔫 +25 SP – for each kill
🚩 +10 SP – for activating a capture point
⏱️ +1 SP per second – while standing in the capture zone
🎯 +100 SP – for successfully capturing a point

💎 Bonus AP for purchasing #NFTs:

🟢 Uncommon JETPACK – 220 AP
🟢 Uncommon WEAPON – 220 AP
🟢 Uncommon LEGEND – 550 AP

🔵 Rare JETPACK – 330 AP
🔵 Rare WEAPON – 330 AP
🔵 Rare LEGEND – 770 AP

🟣 Epic JETPACK – 440 AP
🟣 Epic WEAPON – 440 AP
🟣 Epic LEGEND – 990 AP

#GameFi #Web3
